ocr_findings.description: Image shows '● 試験範囲全体における本章の位置づけ' with a bullet rendered as '●'; OCR renders it as plain text '● 試験範囲全体における本章の位置づけ' — acceptable.

reviewer_notes: Classic chapter-title page: large '第11章' header, large title 'ハードウェア', short intro paragraph, two bullet points in the 'ここに注目して読もう！' box, and a subject-area position table. Body content is purely introductory/navigational. chapter_title is the correct label. OCR is highly faithful with table structure preserved.
